children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Except as otherwise provided in this section, gain on the disposition of any market discount bond shall be treated as ordinary income to the extent it does not exceed the accrued market discount on such bond. Such gain shall be recognized notwithstanding any other provision of this subtitle.

children.heading: Dispositions other than sales, etc.
children.label: 2 Dispositions other than sales, etc.
children.text: For purposes of paragraph (1), a person disposing of any market discount bond in any transaction other than a sale, exchange, or involuntary conversion shall be treated as realizing an amount equal to the fair market value of the bond.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Any partial principal payment on a market discount bond shall be included in gross income as ordinary income to the extent such payment does not exceed the accrued market discount on such bond.

children.heading: Adjustment
children.label: B Adjustment
children.text: If subparagraph (A) applies to any partial principal payment on any market discount bond, for purposes of applying this section to any disposition of (or subsequent partial principal payment on) such bond, the amount of accrued market discount shall be reduced by the amount of such partial principal payment included in gross income under subparagraph (A).

children.heading: Gain treated as interest for certain purposes
children.label: 4 Gain treated as interest for certain purposes
children.text: Except for purposes of sections 103, 871(a), 881, 1441, 1442, and 6049 (and such other provisions as may be specified in regulations), any amount treated as ordinary income under paragraph (1) or (3) shall be treated as interest for purposes of this title.

children.label: A
children.text: the number of days which the taxpayer held the bond, bears to

children.label: B
children.text: the number of days after the date the taxpayer acquired the bond and up to (and including) the date of its maturity.

children.heading: Election of accrual on basis of constant interest rate (in lieu of ratable accrual)
children.label: 2 Election of accrual on basis of constant interest rate (in lieu of ratable accrual)
i
children.text: originally issued on the date on which such bond was acquired by the taxpayer,

children.label: ii
children.text: for an issue price equal to the basis of the taxpayer in such bond immediately after its acquisition.

children.heading: Coordination where bond has original issue discount
children.label: B Coordination where bond has original issue discount
i
children.text: the stated redemption price at maturity of such bond shall be treated as equal to its revised issue price, and

children.label: ii
children.text: the determination of the portion of the original issue discount which would have been includible in the gross income of the taxpayer under section 1272(a) shall be made under regulations prescribed by the Secretary.

children.heading: Election irrevocable
children.label: C Election irrevocable
children.text: An election under subparagraph (A), once made with respect to any bond, shall be irrevocable.

children.heading: Special rule where partial principal payments
children.label: 3 Special rule where partial principal payments
children.text: In the case of a bond the principal of which may be paid in 2 or more payments, the amount of accrued market discount shall be determined under regulations prescribed by the Secretary.

children.label: A
children.text: the transferee shall be treated as having acquired the bond on the date on which it was acquired by the transferor for an amount equal to the basis of the transferor, and

children.label: B
children.text: proper adjustments shall be made for gain recognized by the transferor on such transfer (and for any original issue discount or market discount included in the gross income of the transferor).

children.label: A
children.text: shall be treated as accrued market discount with respect to the exchanged basis property received by the taxpayer in such transaction if such property is a market discount bond, and

children.label: B
children.text: shall be treated as ordinary income on the disposition of the exchanged basis property received by the taxpayer in such exchange if such property is not a market discount bond.

children.heading: Paragraph (1) to apply to certain distributions by corporations or partnerships
children.label: 3 Paragraph (1) to apply to certain distributions by corporations or partnerships
children.text: For purposes of paragraph (1), if the basis of any market discount bond in the hands of a transferee is determined under section 732(a), or 732(b), such property shall be treated as transferred basis property in the hands of such transferee.

children.label: A
children.text: paragraph (1) of such subsection shall not apply,

children.label: B
children.text: an exchange qualifying under section 354(a), 355(a), or 356(a) (determined without regard to subsection (a) of this section) shall be treated as an exchange described in paragraph (3) of such subsection, and

children.label: C
children.text: paragraph (3) of section 1245(b) shall be applied as if it did not contain a reference to section 351, and
appropriate adjustments shall be made to the basis of any property to reflect gain recognized under subsection (a).
